```text
     1→/**
     2→ * styles.css
     3→ * Complete stylesheet for cv-builder web application.
     4→ * Organized into sections by component for easy maintenance.
     5→ */
     6→
     7→/* ===== RESET & BASE ===== */
     8→* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
     9→body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; background: #f8fafc; }
    10→
    11→/* ===== HEADER ===== */
    12→.header { background: #1e293b; color: #fff; padding: 16px 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
    13→.header h1 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; }
    14→
    15→/* ===== ACCESSIBILITY UTILITY ===== */
    16→.sr-only {
    17→  position: absolute;
    18→  width: 1px;
    19→  height: 1px;
    20→  padding: 0;
    21→  margin: -1px;
    22→  overflow: hidden;
    23→  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
    24→  white-space: nowrap;
    25→  border: 0;
    26→}
    27→
    28→/* ===== AUTH BADGE ===== */
    29→.auth-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); transition: background 0.2s; }
    30→.auth-badge:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
    31→.auth-badge.authenticated { color: #86efac; border-color: #86efac; }
    32→.auth-badge.unauthenticated { color: #fca5a5; border-color: #fca5a5; }
    33→.auth-badge.polling { color: #fde68a; border-color: #fde68a; }
    34→
    35→/* ===== HEADER PILL BUTTONS (Sessions, Model) ===== */
    36→.header-pill-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); transition: background 0.2s; }
    37→.header-pill-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); }
    38→.header-pill-btn .pill-chevron { opacity: 0.55; font-size: 0.75em; }
    39→#session-switcher-btn.is-session-active { background: rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.18); border-color: rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.5); }
    40→
    41→/* ===== AUTH MODAL ===== */
    42→.auth-modal-overlay { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 1000; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
    43→.auth-modal-overlay.visible { display: flex; }
    44→.auth-modal { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; max-width: 480px; width: 90%; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
    45→.auth-modal h2 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    46→.auth-modal p { color: #475569; margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1.5; }
    47→.auth-code { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 6px; color: #1e293b; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 16px 24px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; margin: 20px 0; font-family: monospace; }
    48→.auth-modal-actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 20px; }
    49→.auth-btn-primary { flex: 1; background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }
    50→.auth-btn-primary:hover { background: #2563eb; }
    51→.auth-btn-secondary { flex: 1; background: #f1f5f9; color: #475569; border: none; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; }
    52→.auth-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e2e8f0; }
    53→.auth-status-msg { font-size: 13px; color: #64748b; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px; min-height: 20px; }
    54→
    55→/* ===== POSITION BAR ===== */
    56→.position-bar { background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 16px 24px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
    57→.position-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; }
    58→.step.clickable { cursor: pointer; }
    59→.step.clickable:hover { filter: brightness(0.93); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
    60→.load-item-row:hover td { background: #f0f9ff !important; }
    61→
    62→/* ===== WORKFLOW STEPS ===== */
    63→.workflow { background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 20px 24px; }
    64→.workflow-steps { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 32px; }
    65→.step { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; }
    66→.step.active { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; cursor: pointer; }
    67→.step.active:hover { filter: brightness(0.93); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
    68→.step.completed { background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; cursor: pointer; }
    69→.step.completed:hover { filter: brightness(0.93); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
    70→.step.upcoming { background: #f8fafc; color: #cbd5e1; }
    71→.arrow { color: #94a3b8; }
    72→
    73→/* ===== SESSION CONFLICT BANNER ===== */
    74→#session-conflict-banner { display: none; background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; border-bottom: 1px solid #fcd34d; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 14px; text-align: center; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1000; }
    75→#session-conflict-banner button { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; margin-left: 12px; color: #92400e; font-size: 16px; }
    76→
    77→/* ===== SESSION SWITCHER ===== */
    78→.session-switcher-sections { display: grid; gap: 18px; padding: 16px; }
    79→.session-switcher-section { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; background: #fff; overflow: hidden; }
    80→.session-switcher-section-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
    81→.session-switcher-section-header h3 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; }
    82→.session-switcher-section-note { font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; }
    83→.session-switcher-empty { padding: 18px 16px; color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; }
    84→.session-switcher-list { display: grid; gap: 0; }
    85→.session-switcher-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; }
    86→.session-switcher-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    87→.session-switcher-row-main { min-width: 0; flex: 1; }
    88→.session-switcher-row-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    89→.session-switcher-row-title strong { color: #0f172a; font-size: 14px; }
    90→.session-switcher-row-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; }
    91→.session-switcher-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    92→.session-switcher-link,
    93→.session-switcher-btn { border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; }
    94→.session-switcher-link { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; }
    95→.session-switcher-link:hover { background: #dbeafe; }
    96→.session-switcher-btn { background: #fff; color: #475569; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; }
    97→.session-switcher-btn:hover { background: #f8fafc; }
    98→.session-switcher-btn.danger { background: #fff1f2; color: #be123c; border-color: #fecdd3; }
    99→.session-switcher-btn.danger:hover { background: #ffe4e6; }
   100→.session-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; }
   101→.session-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: currentColor; display: inline-block; }
   102→.session-status-current { color: #166534; background: #dcfce7; }
   103→.session-status-owned { color: #92400e; background: #fef3c7; }
   104→.session-status-unclaimed { color: #1d4ed8; background: #dbeafe; }
   105→.session-status-saved { color: #475569; background: #e2e8f0; }
   106→.session-switcher-landing-shell { max-width: 1040px; margin: 32px auto; padding: 0 12px; }
   107→.session-switcher-landing-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
   108→.session-switcher-landing-copy h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; color: #0f172a; }
   109→.session-switcher-landing-copy p { margin: 0; color: #64748b; }
   110→.session-switcher-landing-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
   111→
   112→@media (max-width: 720px) {
   113→  .session-switcher-row { flex-direction: column; }
   114→  .session-switcher-actions { width: 100%; flex-wrap: wrap; }
   115→  .session-switcher-link,
   116→  .session-switcher-btn { flex: 1; text-align: center; justify-content: center; }
   117→}
   118→
   119→/* ===== MAIN LAYOUT ===== */
   120→.main-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 210px); gap: 0; min-height: 500px; }
   121→
   122→/* ===== INTERACTION AREA ===== */
   123→.interaction-area {
   124→  width: 40%;
   125→  display: flex;
   126→  flex-direction: column;
   127→  background: #fff;
   128→  border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
   129→  transition: all 0.3s;
   130→  position: relative;
   131→  flex-shrink: 0;
   132→  max-height: calc(100vh - 210px);
   133→  overflow: hidden;
   134→}
   135→.interaction-area.collapsed { width: 50px; min-width: 50px; max-width: 50px; }
   136→.interaction-area.collapsed > *:not(.toggle-chat) { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
   137→
   138→/* ===== TOGGLE CHAT BUTTON ===== */
   139→.toggle-chat {
   140→  position: absolute;
   141→  right: 8px;
   142→  top: 8px;
   143→  background: #3b82f6;
   144→  color: #fff;
   145→  border: none;
   146→  padding: 8px 12px;
   147→  border-radius: 6px;
   148→  cursor: pointer;
   149→  font-size: 16px;
   150→  z-index: 10;
```

```text
     1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""
     3→Minimal Web UI for LLM-Driven CV Generator
     4→
     5→Serves a single-page web app with endpoints to:
     6→- Submit a job description
     7→- Send chat messages to the assistant
     8→- View current state
     9→- Save session
    10→
    11→Run:
    12→    python scripts/web_app.py
    13→
    14→Then open http://localhost:5001
    15→"""
    16→
    17→import argparse
    18→import copy
    19→import dataclasses
    20→import json
    21→import os
    22→import subprocess
    23→import sys
    24→import threading
    25→import traceback
    26→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    27→from datetime import datetime
    28→from pathlib import Path
    29→from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
    30→from dotenv import load_dotenv
    31→
    32→from flask import Flask, jsonify, request, send_file, send_from_directory
    33→import requests
    34→from urllib.parse import urlparse
    35→import re
    36→from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
    37→
    38→# Load environment variables from .env file
    39→env_path = Path(__file__).parent.parent / '.env'
    40→if env_path.exists():
    41→    load_dotenv(env_path)
    42→
    43→# Ensure scripts are importable
    44→sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent))
    45→
    46→from utils.config import get_config, validate_config, ConfigurationError
    47→from utils.llm_client import get_llm_provider, PROVIDER_MODELS, PROVIDER_BILLING, MODEL_INFO
    48→from utils.cv_orchestrator import CVOrchestrator, validate_ats_report
    49→from utils.conversation_manager import ConversationManager, Phase
    50→from utils.llm_client import LLMError, LLMAuthError, LLMRateLimitError, LLMContextLengthError
    51→from utils.copilot_auth import CopilotAuthManager
    52→from utils.pricing_cache import (
    53→    get_cached_pricing, get_pricing_updated_at, get_pricing_source,
    54→    refresh_pricing_cache, maybe_refresh_in_background, lookup_runtime_pricing_bulk, STATIC_PRICING,
    55→)
    56→from utils.spell_checker import SpellChecker
    57→from utils.session_registry import (
    58→    SessionRegistry, SessionNotFoundError, SessionOwnedError
    59→)
    60→
    61→
    62→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63→# API response DTOs — typed dataclasses for the most critical endpoints.
    64→#
    65→# Using dataclasses ensures:
    66→#   • All fields are always present in the JSON response (no silent omissions).
    67→#   • Shape changes (field additions / renames) surface as TypeError at the call site.
    68→#   • The expected response contract is documented in one place.
    69→#
    70→# JS mirror validators live in web/app.js (parseStatusResponse, etc.).
    71→# Update both sides together when adding/removing fields.
    72→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    73→
    74→@dataclass
    75→class StatusResponse:
    76→    """Response shape for GET /api/status."""
    77→    position_name: Optional[str]
    78→    phase: Optional[str]
    79→    llm_provider: str
    80→    llm_model: Optional[str]
    81→    job_description: bool
    82→    job_description_text: Optional[str]
    83→    job_analysis: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
    84→    post_analysis_questions: List[Any]
    85→    post_analysis_answers: Dict[str, Any]
    86→    customizations: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
    87→    generated_files: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
    88→    generation_progress: List[Any]
    89→    persuasion_warnings: List[Any]
    90→    all_experience_ids: List[str]
    91→    all_skills: List[Any]
    92→    all_achievements: List[Any]
    93→    professional_summaries: Dict[str, Any]
    94→    copilot_auth: Dict[str, Any]
    95→    iterating: bool
    96→    reentry_phase: Optional[str]
    97→    experience_decisions: Dict[str, Any]
    98→    skill_decisions: Dict[str, Any]
    99→    achievement_decisions: Dict[str, Any]
   100→    publication_decisions: Dict[str, Any]
   101→    summary_focus_override: Optional[str]
   102→    extra_skills: List[Any]
   103→    session_file: str
   104→    max_skills: int
   105→    achievement_edits: Dict[str, Any]
   106→
   107→
   108→@dataclass
   109→class SessionItem:
   110→    """One entry in the SessionListResponse."""
   111→    path: str
   112→    position_name: str
   113→    timestamp: str
   114→    phase: str
   115→    has_job: bool
   116→    has_analysis: bool
   117→    has_customizations: bool
   118→
   119→
   120→@dataclass
   121→class SessionListResponse:
   122→    """Response shape for GET /api/sessions."""
   123→    sessions: List[SessionItem]
   124→
   125→    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   126→        return {"sessions": [dataclasses.asdict(s) for s in self.sessions]}
   127→
   128→
   129→@dataclass
   130→class RewritesResponse:
   131→    """Response shape for GET /api/rewrites."""
   132→    ok: bool
   133→    rewrites: List[Any]
   134→    persuasion_warnings: List[Any]
   135→    phase: str
   136→
   137→
   138→@dataclass
   139→class MessageResponse:
   140→    """Response shape for POST /api/message."""
   141→    ok: bool
   142→    response: Any
   143→    phase: Optional[str]
   144→
   145→
   146→@dataclass
   147→class ActionResponse:
   148→    """Response shape for POST /api/action."""
   149→    ok: bool
   150→    result: Any
   151→    phase: Optional[str]
   152→
   153→
   154→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   155→# Model-catalog helpers (module-level for testability)
   156→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   157→
   158→_CATALOG_LIST_MODELS_CAPABLE: set[str] = {"openai", "anthropic", "gemini", "groq"}
   159→_CATALOG_STATIC_ONLY: set[str] = {"copilot-oauth", "copilot", "github", "local"}
   160→
   161→
   162→def _catalog_provider_api_key(provider: str) -> Optional[str]:
   163→    if provider == "openai":
   164→        return os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
   165→    if provider == "anthropic":
   166→        return os.getenv("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY")
   167→    if provider == "gemini":
   168→        return os.getenv("GEMINI_API_KEY") or os.getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY")
   169→    if provider == "groq":
   170→        return os.getenv("GROQ_API_KEY")
   171→    return None
   172→
   173→
   174→def _catalog_provider_api_base(provider: str) -> Optional[str]:
   175→    if provider == "openai":
   176→        return os.getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL")
   177→    if provider == "anthropic":
   178→        return os.getenv("ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL")
   179→    if provider == "gemini":
   180→        return os.getenv("GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL")
   181→    if provider == "groq":
   182→        return os.getenv("GROQ_BASE_URL")
   183→    return None
   184→
   185→
   186→def _catalog_normalize_model_id(model_id: str) -> str:
   187→    """Normalize Gemini-style 'models/gemini-2.5-flash' IDs to bare model names."""
   188→    if model_id.startswith("models/"):
   189→        return model_id.split("/", 1)[1]
   190→    return model_id
   191→
   192→
   193→def _catalog_discover_provider_models(provider: str) -> Optional[List[str]]:
   194→    """Return runtime model list for providers that support list_models, or None."""
   195→    if provider not in _CATALOG_LIST_MODELS_CAPABLE or provider in _CATALOG_STATIC_ONLY:
   196→        return None
   197→
   198→    api_key = _catalog_provider_api_key(provider)
   199→    if not api_key:
   200→        return None
```

```text
     1→"""
     2→Conversation Manager for LLM-driven CV generation.
     3→
     4→Handles the interactive conversation flow, state management,
     5→and user interaction.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import json
     9→import re
    10→import uuid
    11→from datetime import datetime
    12→from enum import Enum
    13→from pathlib import Path
    14→from typing import Dict, List, Optional
    15→import readline  # Enable line editing and history for input()
    16→
    17→from .llm_client import LLMClient, LLMError, LLMAuthError, LLMRateLimitError, LLMContextLengthError
    18→from .cv_orchestrator import CVOrchestrator
    19→from .config import get_config
    20→
    21→
    22→# SOURCE OF TRUTH for workflow phase names.
    23→# The JS mirror is PHASES in web/state-manager.js — update both files together.
    24→class Phase(str, Enum):
    25→    INIT          = 'init'
    26→    JOB_ANALYSIS  = 'job_analysis'
    27→    CUSTOMIZATION = 'customization'
    28→    REWRITE_REVIEW = 'rewrite_review'
    29→    SPELL_CHECK   = 'spell_check'
    30→    GENERATION    = 'generation'
    31→    LAYOUT_REVIEW = 'layout_review'
    32→    REFINEMENT    = 'refinement'
    33→
    34→
    35→class ConversationManager:
    36→    """Manages conversational flow for CV generation."""
    37→    
    38→    def __init__(
    39→        self,
    40→        orchestrator: CVOrchestrator,
    41→        llm_client: LLMClient,
    42→        config=None
    43→    ):
    44→        self.orchestrator = orchestrator
    45→        self.llm = llm_client
    46→        self.config = config or get_config()
    47→        self.conversation_history: List[Dict[str, str]] = []
    48→        self.state = {
    49→            'phase':              Phase.INIT,
    50→            'position_name':      None,
    51→            'job_description':    None,
    52→            'job_analysis':       None,
    53→            'post_analysis_questions': [],
    54→            'post_analysis_answers':   {},
    55→            'customizations':     None,
    56→            'generated_files':    None,
    57→            'pending_rewrites':   None,   # List[Dict] from propose_rewrites
    58→            'persuasion_warnings': [],    # List[Dict] from run_persuasion_checks (Phase 10)
    59→            'generation_progress': [],    # List[Dict] step-by-step progress from generate_cv (Phase 10)
    60→            'approved_rewrites':  [],     # List[Dict] user-accepted or user-edited
    61→            'rewrite_audit':      [],     # full record: proposal + outcome for metadata
    62→            'layout_instructions': [],    # List[Dict] layout instruction history (Phase 12)
    63→            'cover_letter_text':   None,   # str — finalized cover letter body (Phase 14)
    64→            'cover_letter_params': None,   # Dict — generation params (tone, hiring_manager, …)
    65→            'cover_letter_reused_from': None,  # str session path or None
    66→            'screening_responses': [],    # List[Dict] — saved screening responses (Phase 15)
    67→            'experience_decisions':   {},   # Dict — per-experience keep/remove/modify decisions
    68→            'skill_decisions':         {},   # Dict — per-skill decisions
    69→            'achievement_decisions':   {},   # Dict — per-achievement decisions
    70→            'publication_decisions':   {},   # Dict — per-publication accept/reject decisions
    71→            'summary_focus_override':  None, # str — selected professional summary key
    72→            'extra_skills':            [],   # List[str] — LLM-suggested skills not in master CV
    73→            'achievement_rewrite_log': [],   # List[Dict] — AI rewrite interactions per achievement
    74→        }
    75→        self.session_dir: Optional[Path] = None
    76→        self.session_id: Optional[str] = None
    77→        # Readline history file
    78→        self.history_file: Path = Path(self.config.get('session.history_file', 'files/.input_history'))
    79→    
    80→    def _get_multiline_input(self) -> str:
    81→        """Get multi-line input with terminators (DONE/END) and QUIT.
    82→
    83→        DONE/END: finish multi-line entry
    84→        QUIT: confirm, save session, and exit application
    85→        """
    86→        print(
    87→            "(Enter multiple lines. Type 'DONE' or 'END' on a line by itself; "
    88→            "type 'QUIT' to exit)"
    89→        )
    90→        
    91→        lines = []
    92→        
    93→        while True:
    94→            try:
    95→                line = input()
    96→                
    97→                # Check for terminator keywords
    98→                upper = line.strip().upper()
    99→                if upper in ['DONE', 'END']:
   100→                    break
```

You are performing a systematic UX heuristic evaluation of the cv-builder web application as a **senior interaction designer**.

## Your Task

Read the following source files (all under `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/`), then evaluate the UI against Nielsen's 10 Usability Heuristics and additional UX dimensions.

### Files to Read (required)

1. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/web/index.html`
2. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/web/app.js`
3. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/web/ui-core.js`
4. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/web/state-manager.js`
5. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/web/styles.css`
6. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/scripts/web_app.py`
7. `/Users/warnes/src/cv-builder/scripts/utils/conversation_manager.py`

Do NOT read tasks/gaps.md or tasks/ui-review.md — evaluate against source code only.

### Evaluation: Nielsen's 10 Heuristics

Rate each heuristic and cite specific file + line evidence:

| # | Heuristic |
|---|-----------|
| H1 | Visibility of system status |
| H2 | Match between system and the real world |
| H3 | User control and freedom |
| H4 | Consistency and standards |
| H5 | Error prevention |
| H6 | Recognition rather than recall |
| H7 | Flexibility and efficiency of use |
| H8 | Aesthetic and minimalist design |
| H9 | Help users recognise, diagnose, and recover from errors |
| H10 | Help and documentation |

Severity ratings:
- 🟢 Good — Heuristic well-satisfied
- 🟡 Minor — Minor violation(s); usable but could improve
- 🟠 Major — Significant violation(s); causes user friction
- 🔴 Critical — Severe violation; likely causes task failure

### Evaluation: Additional UX Dimensions

| Dimension | What to assess |
|-----------|---------------|
| **Cognitive load** | Minimum information per screen; appropriate chunking |
| **Visual hierarchy** | Typography, spacing, colour guide attention to key action |
| **Information architecture** | Grouping matches user's mental model of building a CV |
| **Workflow momentum** | Bottlenecks or decision points that break forward progress |
| **Feedback loops** | Async operations (LLM calls, file generation) have timely feedback |
| **Error recovery** | Failure states handled gracefully with clear recovery paths |
| **Affordance clarity** | Interactive elements visually distinguishable from static content |

### Top 5 UX Issues

Identify the top 5 UX issues most likely to cause friction or task abandonment, ranked by impact. For each:
- Describe the problem
- Cite file + line
- Propose concrete remediation (1–2 sentences)

### Return Format

```markdown

**Affected area:** {file:line}
**Remediation:** ...

#### UX-2: ...
...
```

Be specific — cite file:line for every finding. Do not simply restate acceptance criteria from user story files. Surface issues that user stories may not enumerate.

## Key Evidence References

**Implemented & Working Well:**
- **US-A1**: Job input (URL + paste) with protected-site warning → app.js:1481–1923, index.html:1481–1532
- **US-A2**: Job analysis with mismatch detection & clarifying questions → app.js:2865–2927, app.js:2535–2750
- **US-A4**: Rewrite cards with before/after diff, weak-evidence badge, edit/accept/reject → app.js:5860–6000
- **US-A5a**: HTML generation with progress indicator and preview → app.js:6450–6550
- **US-A12**: Re-run affordance with downstream-aware confirmation → app.js:7299–7389

**Partial Implementation (spec gaps):**
- **US-A2**: Clarification answers not verified to pass to ALL downstream calls (cover_letter, screening); no prior-session pre-population logic found
- **US-A3**: Reordering UI present for experiences/achievements/skills but backend persistence of reorder state unclear
- **US-A4b**: Spell check has backend support (scripts/utils/spell_checker.py) but UI coverage of all context types (bullet, skill_name, cover_letter, screening_response) unclear; zero-flag case completes but no explicit green banner
- **US-A5b**: **Layout instructions feature NOT implemented** — no text input field, no preview refresh, no "Confirm Layout" button found in current code
- **US-A6**: Re-run logic present but targeted re-entry (vs full re-run) unclear from code
- **US-A7/A8**: Prior session matching (by tone/role type) UI unclear; may require backend search
- **US-A12**: Clarification amendment during re-run not exposed in UI; keyboard shortcut not found

**Not Implemented:**
- **US-A10**: Master CV update (natural language + document ingestion) — tab exists but no editing logic in app.js
- **US-A11**: Session master data harvest (post-finalise prompt, candidate items, opt-in checkboxes, consolidated diff) — completely absent
- **US-A5b** (critical gap): Natural-language layout instructions with incremental preview refresh — entire feature missing from UI
